attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT AUDIT_RESULT_ID ,              
AUDIT_QUERY_ID          ,      
AUDIT_NAME               ,     
AUDIT_OWNER               ,    
AUDIT_MONTH                ,   
AUDIT_YEAR                  ,  
PID                          , 
DESCRIPTION                   ,
CUSTOM_SPECIFIC               ,
ERP_SPECIFIC                  ,
SOURCE                        ,
PT_CC                         ,
COUNTRY_GROUP                 ,
US_HTS                        ,
CG_HTS                        ,
CG_DUTY_RATE                  ,
REQUESTOR                     ,
TRAINED_FLAG                  ,
COMMIT_STATUS                 ,
AUDIT_STATUS                  ,
'N' AS IS_CORRECT_SPECIFIC    ,       
'N' AS IMPACTING_US_HTS        ,      
'N' AS IMPACTING_CG_HTS         ,     
'UNKNOWN' AS NEW_SPECIFIC              ,    
'N' AS AUDITOR_COMMENT            ,   
'N' AS REASON_MIS_CLASSIFICATION   ,  
CREATED_BY                    ,
CREATION_DATE                 ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
ERP_SPECIFIC_ID	,
CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID	,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
ACTION_CODE                   ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE                                    
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_POOL_RESULTS SXCAPR
WHERE NOT EXISTS   (SEL 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CLSFTN_RULE_AUDIT QRY WHERE SXCAPR.AUDIT_QUERY_ID =QRY.SK_AUDIT_QUERY_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG WHERE SXCAPR.COUNTRY_GROUP=NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD)
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP WHERE  SXCAPR.PID=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )
OR   NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP1 WHERE   COALESCE( SXCAPR.CREATED_BY, 'UNKNOWN') = NCWP1.CEC_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2 WHERE  COALESCE( SXCAPR.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 'UNKNOWN') =NCWP2.CEC_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS1 WHERE NCIS1.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT  =COALESCE(SXCAPR.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID, -999))
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2 WHERE NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT  =COALESCE(SXCAPR.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID, -999))
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP3 WHERE NCWP3.CEC_ID = COALESCE( SXCAPR.REQUESTOR, 'UNKNOWN'))
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NIC WHERE   NIC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD=SXCAPR.US_HTS 
AND COALESCE(NIC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NIC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM) =SXCAPR.PID
AND NIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE =SXCAPR.SOURCE
AND NIC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD= 'US')
OR NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NICC
WHERE   NICC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD =SXCAPR.CG_HTS
AND NICC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD =SXCAPR.COUNTRY_GROUP 
AND COALESCE(NICC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NICC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM) =SXCAPR.PID
AND NICC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE = SXCAPR.SOURCE)
AND NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_TRGT_RESULTS SATR
WHERE SATR.AUDIT_QUERY_ID = SXCAPR.AUDIT_QUERY_ID AND SATR.PID=SXCAPR.PID AND SATR.COUNTRY_GROUP = SXCAPR.COUNTRY_GROUP)
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SXCAPR.AUDIT_QUERY_ID, SXCAPR.PID,SXCAPR.COUNTRY_GROUP ORDER BY SXCAPR.CREATION_DATE DESC) =1

SELECT
NIAR.BK_AUDIT_NAME AS BK_AUDIT_NAME,
NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD AS BK_WORLD_CG_CD,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
ST.CG_DUTY_RATE AS CG_DUTY_RATE,
COALESCE(ST.SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(ST.TRAINED_FLAG,'=') AS REQUESTOR_TRAINED_FLG,
COALESCE(ST.COMMIT_STATUS,'=') AS COMMIT_STATUS_FLG,
COALESCE(ST.AUDIT_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS AUDIT_STATUS_CD,
'P' AS POOL_TARGET_TYPE,
COALESCE(ST.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
COALESCE(ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
COALESCE(NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP2.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_UPDT_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP3.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NIC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,-999)  AS US_ITM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
COALESCE(NICC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,-999) AS  ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
'=' AS  RU_CCAP_IS_CORRECT_FLG,
'=' AS RU_US_HTS_IMPACTED_FLG,
'=' AS RU_CG_HTS_IMPACTED_FLG,
'' AS RU_MIS_CLSFCTN_REASON_CMT,
COALESCE(NCIS2.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY  ,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
COALESCE(NCIS1.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
-999 AS RU_NEW_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ST.ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_POOL_RESULTS ST
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CLSFTN_RULE_AUDIT NIAR
ON ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID=NIAR.SK_AUDIT_QUERY_ID
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
ON ST.COUNTRY_GROUP=NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON ST.PID=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
ON ST.CREATED_BY=NCWP1.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
ON ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY=NCWP2.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS1
ON ST.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS1.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2
ON ST.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP3
ON ST.REQUESTOR=NCWP3.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NIC
on  ST.US_HTS=NIC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
AND ST.PID=COALESCE(NIC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NIC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM)
AND ST.SOURCE=NIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
AND NIC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD= 'US'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NICC
on  ST.CG_HTS=NICC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
AND ST.COUNTRY_GROUP=NICC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
AND ST.PID=COALESCE(NICC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NICC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM)
AND ST.SOURCE=NICC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
WHERE ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID IS NOT NULL
AND ST.PID IS NOT NULL
AND ST.COUNTRY_GROUP IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_TRGT_RESULTS SXCATR WHERE SXCATR.AUDIT_QUERY_ID = ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID AND SXCATR.PID=ST.PID AND SXCATR.COUNTRY_GROUP =ST.COUNTRY_GROUP )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID, ST.PID,ST.COUNTRY_GROUP ORDER BY ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1
UNION
SELECT
NIAR.BK_AUDIT_NAME AS BK_AUDIT_NAME,
NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD AS BK_WORLD_CG_CD,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
EX.CG_DUTY_RATE AS CG_DUTY_RATE,
COALESCE(EX.SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(EX.TRAINED_FLAG,'=') AS REQUESTOR_TRAINED_FLG,
COALESCE(EX.COMMIT_STATUS,'=') AS COMMIT_STATUS_FLG,
COALESCE(EX.AUDIT_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS AUDIT_STATUS_CD,
 'P'  AS POOL_TARGET_TYPE ,
COALESCE(EX.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
COALESCE(EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))   AS SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
COALESCE(NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP2.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_UPDT_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP3.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NIC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,-999)  AS  US_ITM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
COALESCE(NICC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,-999)  AS  ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
'=' AS  RU_CCAP_IS_CORRECT_FLG,
'=' AS RU_US_HTS_IMPACTED_FLG,
'=' AS RU_CG_HTS_IMPACTED_FLG,
'' AS RU_MIS_CLSFCTN_REASON_CMT,
COALESCE(NCIS2.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
COALESCE(NCIS1.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
-999 AS RU_NEW_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
EX.ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_POOL_RESULTS EX
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CLSFTN_RULE_AUDIT NIAR
ON EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID=NIAR.SK_AUDIT_QUERY_ID
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
ON EX.COUNTRY_GROUP=NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON EX.PID=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
ON EX.CREATED_BY=NCWP1.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
ON EX.LAST_UPDATED_BY=NCWP2.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS1
ON EX.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS1.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2
ON EX.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP3
ON EX.REQUESTOR=NCWP3.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NIC
on  EX.US_HTS=NIC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
AND EX.PID=COALESCE(NIC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NIC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM)
AND EX.SOURCE=NIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
AND NIC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD= 'US'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NICC
on  EX.CG_HTS=NICC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
AND EX.COUNTRY_GROUP=NICC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
AND EX.PID=COALESCE(NICC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NICC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM)
AND EX.SOURCE=NICC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
WHERE EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID IS NOT NULL
AND EX.PID IS NOT NULL
AND EX.COUNTRY_GROUP IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_TRGT_RESULTS SXCATR WHERE SXCATR.AUDIT_QUERY_ID = EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID AND SXCATR.PID=EX.PID AND SXCATR.COUNTRY_GROUP =EX.COUNTRY_GROUP )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID, EX.PID,EX.COUNTRY_GROUP ORDER BY EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1

SELECT
NIAR.BK_AUDIT_NAME AS BK_AUDIT_NAME,
NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD AS BK_WORLD_CG_CD,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
ST.CG_DUTY_RATE AS CG_DUTY_RATE,
COALESCE(ST.SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(ST.TRAINED_FLAG,'=') AS REQUESTOR_TRAINED_FLG,
COALESCE(ST.COMMIT_STATUS,'=') AS COMMIT_STATUS_FLG,
COALESCE(ST.AUDIT_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS AUDIT_STATUS_CD,
'T' AS POOL_TARGET_TYPE,
COALESCE(ST.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
COALESCE(ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))   AS SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
COALESCE(NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP2.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_UPDT_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP3.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NIC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,-999)  AS US_ITM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
COALESCE(NICC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,-999)  AS  ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
COALESCE(ST.IS_CORRECT_SPECIFIC,'=')  AS RU_CCAP_IS_CORRECT_FLG,
COALESCE(ST.IMPACTING_US_HTS,'=') AS RU_US_HTS_IMPACTED_FLG,
COALESCE(ST.IMPACTING_CG_HTS,'=') AS RU_CG_HTS_IMPACTED_FLG,
ST.REASON_MIS_CLASSIFICATION AS RU_MIS_CLSFCTN_REASON_CMT,
COALESCE(NCIS2.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
COALESCE(NCIS1.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
COALESCE(NCIS3.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,-999) AS RU_NEW_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
ST.ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_TRGT_RESULTS ST
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CLSFTN_RULE_AUDIT NIAR
ON ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID=NIAR.SK_AUDIT_QUERY_ID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
ON ST.COUNTRY_GROUP=NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON ST.PID=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
ON ST.CREATED_BY=NCWP1.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
ON ST.LAST_UPDATED_BY=NCWP2.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS1
ON ST.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS1.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2
ON ST.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS3
ON ST.NEW_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS3.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP3
ON ST.REQUESTOR=NCWP3.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NIC
on  ST.US_HTS=NIC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
AND ST.PID=COALESCE(NIC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NIC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM)
AND ST.SOURCE=NIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
AND NIC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD = 'US'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NICC
on  ST.CG_HTS=NICC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
AND ST.COUNTRY_GROUP=NICC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
AND ST.PID=COALESCE(NICC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NICC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM)
AND ST.SOURCE=NICC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
WHERE ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID IS NOT NULL
AND ST.PID IS NOT NULL
AND ST.COUNTRY_GROUP IS NOT NULL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ST.AUDIT_QUERY_ID, ST.PID,ST.COUNTRY_GROUP ORDER BY ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1
UNION
SELECT
NIAR.BK_AUDIT_NAME AS BK_AUDIT_NAME,
NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD AS BK_WORLD_CG_CD,
COALESCE(NP.ITEM_KEY,-999) AS PRODUCT_KEY,
EX.CG_DUTY_RATE AS CG_DUTY_RATE,
COALESCE(EX.SOURCE,'UNKNOWN') AS PRODUCT_SOURCE_CD,
COALESCE(EX.TRAINED_FLAG,'=') AS REQUESTOR_TRAINED_FLG,
COALESCE(EX.COMMIT_STATUS,'=') AS COMMIT_STATUS_FLG,
COALESCE(EX.AUDIT_STATUS,'UNKNOWN') AS AUDIT_STATUS_CD,
 'T' AS POOL_TARGET_TYPE ,
COALESCE(EX.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
COALESCE(EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))   AS SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
COALESCE(NCWP1.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_CRTD_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP2.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS SRC_UPDT_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP3.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999) AS REQUESTOR_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NIC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,-999)  AS  US_ITM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
COALESCE(NICC.ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,-999)  AS  ITEM_CG_HTS_CLSFCTN_KEY,
COALESCE(EX.IS_CORRECT_SPECIFIC,'=') AS RU_CCAP_IS_CORRECT_FLG,
COALESCE(EX.IMPACTING_US_HTS,'=') AS RU_US_HTS_IMPACTED_FLG,
COALESCE(EX.IMPACTING_CG_HTS,'=') AS RU_CG_HTS_IMPACTED_FLG,
EX.REASON_MIS_CLASSIFICATION AS RU_MIS_CLSFCTN_REASON_CMT,
COALESCE(NCIS2.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,-999) AS ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
COALESCE(NCIS1.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,-999) AS CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
COALESCE(NCIS3.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY ,-999) AS RU_NEW_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
EX.ACTION_CODE,
'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_TRGT_RESULTS EX
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CLSFTN_RULE_AUDIT NIAR
ON EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID=NIAR.SK_AUDIT_QUERY_ID
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG
ON EX.COUNTRY_GROUP=NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON EX.PID=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP1
ON EX.CREATED_BY=NCWP1.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2
ON EX.LAST_UPDATED_BY=NCWP2.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS1
ON EX.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS1.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2
ON EX.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS3
ON EX.NEW_SPECIFIC_ID=NCIS3.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP3
ON EX.REQUESTOR=NCWP3.CEC_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NIC
on  EX.US_HTS=NIC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
AND EX.PID=COALESCE(NIC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NIC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM)
AND EX.SOURCE=NIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
AND NIC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD= 'US'
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NICC
on  EX.CG_HTS=NICC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD
AND EX.COUNTRY_GROUP=NICC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD
AND EX.PID=COALESCE(NICC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NICC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM)
AND EX.SOURCE=NICC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE
WHERE EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID IS NOT NULL
AND EX.PID IS NOT NULL
AND EX.COUNTRY_GROUP IS NOT NULL
AND NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_POOL_RESULTS  SXCATR WHERE SXCATR.AUDIT_QUERY_ID = EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID AND SXCATR.PID=EX.PID AND SXCATR.COUNTRY_GROUP =EX.COUNTRY_GROUP )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EX.AUDIT_QUERY_ID, EX.PID, EX.COUNTRY_GROUP ORDER BY EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE DESC) =1

SELECT AUDIT_RESULT_ID ,              
AUDIT_QUERY_ID          ,      
AUDIT_NAME               ,     
AUDIT_OWNER               ,    
AUDIT_MONTH                ,   
AUDIT_YEAR                  ,  
PID                          , 
DESCRIPTION                   ,
CUSTOM_SPECIFIC               ,
ERP_SPECIFIC                  ,
SOURCE                        ,
PT_CC                         ,
COUNTRY_GROUP                 ,
US_HTS                        ,
CG_HTS                        ,
CG_DUTY_RATE                  ,
REQUESTOR                     ,
TRAINED_FLAG                  ,
COMMIT_STATUS                 ,
AUDIT_STATUS                  ,
 IS_CORRECT_SPECIFIC    ,       
 IMPACTING_US_HTS        ,      
 IMPACTING_CG_HTS         ,     
 NEW_SPECIFIC              ,    
 AUDITOR_COMMENT            ,   
 REASON_MIS_CLASSIFICATION   ,  
CREATED_BY                    ,
CREATION_DATE                 ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
ERP_SPECIFIC_ID 	,
CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID 	,
NEW_SPECIFIC_ID 	,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
ACTION_CODE                   ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE                                    
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_TRGT_RESULTS SXCATR
WHERE NOT EXISTS   (SEL 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITEM_CLSFTN_RULE_AUDIT NICRA WHERE SXCATR.AUDIT_QUERY_ID =NICRA.SK_AUDIT_QUERY_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP NWCG WHERE SXCATR.COUNTRY_GROUP=NWCG.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD)
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP WHERE  SXCATR.PID=NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID )
OR   NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY  NCWP1 WHERE   COALESCE( SXCATR.CREATED_BY, 'UNKNOWN') = NCWP1.CEC_ID)
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP2 WHERE  COALESCE( SXCATR.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 'UNKNOWN') =NCWP2.CEC_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS1 WHERE NCIS1.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT  =COALESCE(SXCATR.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID, -999))
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS2 WHERE NCIS2.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT  =COALESCE(SXCATR.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID, -999))
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP3 WHERE NCWP3.CEC_ID = COALESCE( SXCATR.REQUESTOR, 'UNKNOWN'))
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NIC WHERE   NIC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD=SXCATR.US_HTS 
AND COALESCE(NIC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NIC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM) =SXCATR.PID
AND NIC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE =SXCATR.SOURCE
AND NIC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD= 'US')
OR NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_ITM_CG_CSTMS_CLSFCTN NICC
WHERE   NICC.BK_HRMNZD_TARIFF_SCHEDULE_CD =SXCATR.CG_HTS
AND NICC.BK_WORLD_COUNTRY_GROUP_CD =SXCATR.COUNTRY_GROUP 
AND COALESCE(NICC.DD_ITEM_NUM,NICC.RU_BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM) =SXCATR.PID
AND NICC.ITEM_SOURCE_TYPE = SXCATR.SOURCE)
OR NOT EXISTS (SEL 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC NCIS3 WHERE  NCIS3.SK_SPECIFIC_ID_INT  = COALESCE(SXCATR.NEW_SPECIFIC_ID, -999) )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SXCATR.AUDIT_QUERY_ID, SXCATR.PID,SXCATR.COUNTRY_GROUP ORDER BY SXCATR.CREATION_DATE DESC) =1
